rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §254.040, which governs preservation of campaign finance reports and inspection records. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Each report filed under this chapter shall be preserved by the authority with whom it is filed for at least two years after the date it is filed.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns campaign finance report retention, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
